summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People Operations professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve people experience—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Establish {cross|cross-functional} processes and {tools|documentation} for 70+ staff, streamlining operations and reducing onboarding time by 75%
Manage end-to-end lifecycles for 20+ projects, utilizing {data|feedback loops} to address root causes and optimize {tools|workflows}
Facilitate listening sessions to analyze needs of 25 global {cross|stakeholders}, resulting in 3 new {prog|programs} best aligned with needs
Facilitate training webinars for 600+ participants, boosting {ex|system} understanding and achieving a 78% program enrollment rate
Facilitated organizational change by directing an M&A project, migrating and merging employee {data|records} with high accuracy
Optimized onboarding processes for new hires across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying responsibilities
Improved employee experience by streamlining immigration and relocation processes through coordination with cross-functional teams
Supported HRBP team by piloting an Inclusive Leadership workshop for senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Upskill HR team in {data|data analytics} to audit 300+ leave cases, successfully refuting cost assumptions via {data|evidence-based insights}
Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to amplify employee voice and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed engagement strategies
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants

Location → San Francisco, CA (Open to Relocation). Summary → People Operations umbrella. InGenius led with cross-functional processes + documentation, then end-to-end lifecycles / root-cause / workflows (maps to system documentation + recurring-issue resolution). Vestas led with M&A data-record migration 'with high accuracy' + onboarding 'for new hires' (data accuracy + transactions). Skills kept HRIS-forward; HRCI included (entry-level HR systems role).
